name: @chbrain/khai-engine-recognition
description: khai recognition engine — the social acknowledgment of who a persona is or what they have done
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The social acknowledgment of who a persona is or what they have done.

card.wire: Link the recognition phase the persona is in (claim, encounter, or standing) under Projection.
card.issue: Who the persona needs to be seen as, what they need acknowledged, and who can grant that acknowledgment.
card.require: A persona who holds a claim to recognition that is not yet settled, and a recognizing other whose response will determine the outcome.
card.enforce: Do not conflate recognition with praise. Praise is a response; recognition is the acknowledgment of who the persona is or what they have done. Recognition can be withheld or distorted; it can also be contested.
card.setup: Name what the persona claims, from whom, and what the outcome of recognition or misrecognition would mean for their standing.
